visual_description: A close-up shows a hand gripping a metal bar, partially covered by a white sleeve, in a dimly lit setting. A man in a dark suit and tie, wearing a headset, holds a walkie-talkie to his mouth and speaks. Another man in a light shirt and headphones sits at a desk, staring intently at a computer monitor.
audio_description: A man speaks into a handheld radio while another man listens through headphones, with ambient background noise.
